message:
fix(codegen): Fix TryHelper self capture and add traceback field stubs

Phase 18: Self Capture in TryHelper
- Fix BuiltinFuncs.has("self") incorrectly skipping self in variable capture
- Add renamed variables to func_local_vars so isNameDefined finds them
- Proper cleanup of renamed entries after TryHelper body generation

Phase 19: Traceback Field Stubs
- Add runtime/traceback_stub.zig with stub functions for AOT compatibility
- tb_next, tb_frame return null; tb_lineno, tb_lasti return 0
- Generate stub calls in genAttribute for traceback field access
- Handle traceback field assignment in assign.zig

Core tests (bool, longexp, int_literal, unary, binop): 5/5 passing
